benefits.description: Surgeon and GP content with healing progress of fistula post-excision; user not noticing subjective effects but healing appears to be progressing well clinically

protocol_notes: Ordered liquid BPC from BioPure twice (made ordering mistakes both times). Using to assist fistula healing after excision surgery. No subjective effects noticed but medical professionals satisfied with healing progress. Purchased from BioPure, shipped from Italy to EU country.
